name: Ilkeston Town

locations.address:
Ilkeston Safer Neighbourhood Teams,
Heanor Road,
Ilkeston,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Ilkeston Town, Larklands & Gallows. It belongs to the Ilkeston policing section.

Ilkeston Town Centre is located within the Erewash Borough Council area. It is bordered by the villages of Cossall, Awsworth and Trowell which are policed by Nottinghamshire Police. The town has an excellent location as it is central to both the cities of Derby and Nottingham, thereby providing an excellent base for commuters.
